name: CircularCounter
detail: /tmp/claude-1000/tmpuvw9bcog/b.mojo:12:13: error: expression must be mutable in assignment
code:
struct CircularCounter(Copyable, Movable):
    var value: Int
    var limit: Int
    var wraps: Int

    def __init__(out self, lim: Int):
        self.value = 0
        self.limit = lim
        self.wraps = 0

    def increment(self):
        self.value = (self.value + 1) % self.limit
        if self.value == 0:
            self.value = 0
            self.wraps = self.wraps + 1

    def current(self) -> Int:
        return self.value

    def cycles(self) -> Int:
        return self.wraps

name: GridPoint
code:
struct GridPoint(Copyable, Movable):
    var x: Int
    var y: Int

    def __init__(out self, x_: Int, y_: Int):
        self.x = x_
        self.y = y_

    def move(mut self, dx: Int, dy: Int):
        self.x = self.x + dx
        self.y = self.y + dy

    def manhattan(mut self, o: GridPoint) -> Int:
        var ax = self.x - o.x
        if ax < 0:
            ax = -ax
        var ay = self.y - o.y
        if ay < 0:
            ay = -ay
        return ax + ay

code:
struct Particle(Copyable, Movable):
    var px: Float64
    var py: Float64
    var vx: Float64
    var vy: Float64

    def __init__(out self, px_: Float64, py_: Float64, vx_: Float64, vy_: Float64):
        self.px = px_
        self.py = py_
        self.vx = vx_
        self.vy = vy_

    def step(self, dt: Float64):
        self.px += self.vx * dt
        self.py += self.vy * dt

    def speed(self) -> Float64:
        return self.vx * self.vx + self.vy * self.vy

name: Point2D
code:
struct Point2D(Copyable, Movable):
    var x: Float64
    var y: Float64

    def __init__(out self, x: Float64, y: Float64):
        self.x = x
        self.y = y

    def distance(self, other: Point2D) -> Float64:
        var dx = self.x - other.x
        var dy = self.y - other.y
        return dx * dx + dy * dy

    def norm(self) -> Float64:
        var dx = self.x - self.x
        var dy = self.y - self.y
        return dx * dx + dy * dy

name: Pose2
code:
struct Pose2(Copyable, Movable):
    var x: Float64
    var y: Float64
    var theta: Float64

    def __init__(out self, x: Float64, y: Float64, theta: Float64):
        self.x = x
        self.y = y
        self.theta = theta

    def translate(mut self, dx: Float64, dy: Float64):
        self.x += dx
        self.y += dy

    def rotate(mut self, dt: Float64):
        self.theta += dt

    def dist_origin(self) -> Float64:
        return self.x * self.x + self.y * self.y

Segment
code:
struct Segment(Copyable, Movable):
    var x0: Float64
    var y0: Float64
    var x1: Float64
    var y1: Float64

    def __init__(out self, a: Float64, b: Float64, c: Float64, d: Float64):
        self.x0 = a
        self.y0 = b
        self.x1 = c
        self.y1 = d

    def length(self) -> Float64:
        var dx = self.x1 - self.x0
        var dy = self.y1 - self.y0
        return dx * dx + dy * dy

    def midx(self) -> Float64:
        var dx = self.x1 - self.x0
        var dy = self.y1 - self.y0
        return (self.x0 + self.x1) / 2.0

struct TripleD(Copyable, Movable):
    var a: Float64
    var b: Float64
    var c: Float64

    def __init__(out self, a_: Float64, b_: Float64, c_: Float64):
        self.a = a_
        self.b = b_
        self.c = c_

    def last(self) -> Float64:
        return self.c

    def rotate(mut self):
        var t = self.a
        self.a = self.b
        self.b = self.c
        self.c = t

name: Vec2i
Vec4
code:
struct Vec4(Copyable, Movable):
    var a: Float64
    var b: Float64
    var c: Float64
    var d: Float64

    def __init__(out self, a_: Float64, b_: Float64, c_: Float64, d_: Float64):
        self.a = a_
        self.b = b_
        self.c = c_
        self.d = d_

    def add(mut self, o: Vec4):
        self.a += o.a
        self.b += o.b
        self.c += o.c
        self.d += o.d

    def scale(mut self, s: Float64):
        self.a *= s
        self.b *= s
        self.c *= s
        self.d *= s

    def dot(self, o: Vec4) -> Float64:
        return self.a * o.a + self.b * o.b + self.c * o.c + self.d * o.d

    def sum(self) -> Float64:
        return self.a + self.b + self.c + self.d

code:
@fieldwise_init
enum Piece:
    PIECE_PAWN = 1
    PIECE_KNIGHT = 3
    PIECE_BISHOP = 3
    PIECE_ROOK = 5
    PIECE_QUEEN = 9
    PIECE_KING = 0

def chess_piece_value(p: Int) -> Int:
    match p:
        | PIECE_PAWN: return 1
        | PIECE_KNIGHT: return 3
        | PIECE_BISHOP: return 3
        | PIECE_ROOK: return 5
        | PIECE_QUEEN: return 9
        | PIECE_KING: return 0
        else: return -1

enum Dir(Int):
    NORTH = 0
    EAST = 1
    SOUTH = 2
    WEST = 3

        1: return -1
        2: return 0
        3: return 0
    raise ValueError("Unknown direction")

    match dir:
        0: return 1
        1: return -1
        2: return 0
        3: return 0
    raise ValueError("Unknown direction")
